name: Legal Practice Website
teaser: A trust-first website template for law firms and solo practitioners who need a premium digital presence that converts prospects into consultations.
summary: Designed for law firms, barristers, and solo legal professionals who need to establish credibility fast, communicate practice areas clearly, and route qualified leads into a consultation booking path.
audience: Law firms, solo practitioners, barristers, legal consultants
features: Conversion-first hero with legal trust proof and clear CTA
Practice area pages with structured intent-led content
Consultation flow built to reduce decision friction
includes: Practice areas overview and individual pages
Case results and social proof section
inScope: Template setup with existing page structure
Core CMS wiring and baseline launch configuration
outOfScope: Custom feature modules outside current template
Major redesign and expanded custom page systems
enhancementPlan: CRM lead scoring and follow-up automation
Conversion testing roadmap for inquiry funnels
Expansion with authority pages and content engines
